Annual Finance Report 2022: The company recorded total revenue of $87.4 million for fiscal year 2022, representing a 12% year-over-year increase. Operating expenses rose by 8% primarily due to headcount expansion and increased cloud infrastructure costs. Net income was $9.1 million, yielding a net margin of approximately 10.4%. The board approved a dividend of $0.45 per share to be distributed in Q1 2023.
